name: Descent Charter Compacts
summary: Interlocking charters governing who may enter the Scarlet Depths, what is owed after descent, and how recovered materials are claimed.
motive: Keep underworld extraction productive without letting unsanctioned descent destabilize House order.
power_relations: Sanctioned by Great Houses and enforced through Queen’s Court pressure
Interacts with port factors and forge interests
visible_membership_base: Gate officers, descent captains, oath witnesses, salvage teams.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: The more profitable the depths become, the more the charters invite corruption and reckless overreach.
